# Data Model Checklist: Ingest municipal census datasets

**Purpose**: Ensure entities and fields cover normalization, linking, indicators, and provenance.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/018-census-ingest/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Ingestion run entity captures run ID, status, timestamps, and trigger type.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Census artifact entity stores metadata (year, geography level, schema, refresh date).
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Validation results capture schema and value constraint outcomes.
- [x] CHK-DM-004 Area linking results capture coverage metrics and missing areas.
- [x] CHK-DM-005 Indicator results track limited-accuracy flags for suppressed values.

## Auditability

- [x] CHK-DM-006 QA and promotion outcomes are captured per run.
